title: Resolution Authorizing the Honorable Mayor Antonio L. Kalaw in Behalf of the Municipal Government of Los Baños (MGLB) to Donate One (1) Unit of Horizontal Feed Mixer to Los Baños Natural Pig Raisers Association with Office Address at Barangay Timugan, Los Baños, Laguna Represented by Its President Mr. Crisologo S. Angeles. (AUTHOR: HON. CRIS DAYRIL B. BAGNES, 04/12/2021)
